name.full: Launch Control — Dataverse MCP plugin for Cowork

description.short: Talk to your Launch Control Dataverse environment from Cowork.
description.full: Custom plugin that lets Microsoft 365 Cowork query the Launch Control Dataverse environment through the built-in Dataverse MCP server at /api/mcp. Surfaces launches, milestones, tasks, blockers, status updates, and readiness verdicts — under the signed-in user's Dataverse permissions.
